label: The Shardbound Arsenal
description: The Shardbound Arsenal is a compact, faceted shopfront clad in dust-slick vitrified tiles, its seams traced with grounded gutters that tame Lacrymara’s charged glass fallouts. Interior walls are lined with angled racks and magnetized cradles for razor-edged glasssteel blades, hushlit coil-slingers, and counterweighted faultline pikes engineered for the city’s fused-silicate causeways. A central lensing counter sits beneath a suspended lattice of mirror vanes that calibrate edge geometry and sighting marks against Seamglass Meridian’s copper-white twilight bands. The air carries a persistent dry rasp of glass dust, held in check by inset floor grates leading to sealed cisterns.
